title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support Before Launch Date
scenario: Pre-release Poly device shows "Device support coming soon" pop-up when tapped on black "i" icon before launch date in Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. Pair a not-yet-released Poly Bluetooth audio device with the app (ensure the current date is before the device's official launch date).
3. Navigate to the Home screen of the app.
4. Observe the connection status ring and the icon next to the paired device.
5. Tap the black "i" icon displayed next to the device.
6. Observe the pop-up message that appears.
7. Tap outside the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: The device Home screen shows a green connection status ring and a black \"i\" icon. Tapping the \"i\" icon displays a pop-up message: \"Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited.\" Tapping outside the pop-up dismisses it.
